title: Papa John's Pepperoni Pizza Menu with Prices 2026
description: The definitive guide to Papa John's Pepperoni Pizza. Explore 2026 USA price list for Small to XL sizes, Epic Stuffed Crust upgrades, and full nutrition facts.
fullContent:
The Papa John's Pepperoni Pizza is more than just a menu item; it is a global phenomenon and the undisputed king of pizza delivery across the United States. In 2026, it continues to lead the charts as the most ordered classic pizza, loved for its perfect ratio of savory, spicy pepperoni to melted 100% real mozzarella cheese. If you are looking to save on your next order, be sure to check our latest Papa John's Coupons for exclusive deals.

What sets our Pepperoni Pizza apart from the competition starts with the foundation: our original hand-tossed dough. Made with just six simple ingredients, our dough is never frozen and arrives fresh at every Papa John's location across the USA. This ensures a chewy, golden-brown crust that serves as the perfect canvas for our world-famous signature pizza sauce. Made from vine-ripened tomatoes grown in the sun-drenched valleys of California, our sauce is packed and canned within hours of harvest to lock in that natural sweetness.

As we move to the toppings, we layer a generous amount of premium, high-quality pepperoni slices. These aren't your average pizza toppings; they are specially seasoned to reach a perfect crispiness in our high-heat ovens, releasing just the right amount of spicy oil to meld with the cheese. For those watching their intake, you can review the official Papa John's Nutrition Guide which states that a single slice of our standard 14-inch Large original crust pepperoni pizza contains approximately 230-320 calories.

Whether you're ordering a 'Small' for a quick lunch in downtown Manhattan or an 'Extra Large' for a late-night party in Los Angeles, Papa John's ensures regional price consistency with high value. Our 2026 price guide reflects the best value for money in the fast-food industry, especially when you join Papa Rewards® to earn points on every dollar spent. Experience the recipe that defined an era of better ingredients and better pizza.

Crust Options for Pepperoni Pizza — Which One to Choose?

  • Original Crust: The classic choice. Hand-tossed, chewy interior, lightly golden exterior. Holds toppings well without becoming soggy. The most popular option by far.
  • Crispy Thin Crust: For those who want more topping flavor and less bread. Cracker-like texture, noticeably lower in calories. Best if you are eating solo or watching your intake.
  • New York Style: Large, foldable slices with a soft, pliable crust. Available in Large and XL. If you grew up eating NY pizza, this is the closest approximation from a delivery chain.
  • Epic Stuffed Crust: Mozzarella cheese baked into the crust edge. Adds approximately 80–100 calories per slice but delivers a satisfying cheese-pull experience at the crust. Worth it if you are sharing with cheese lovers.
  • Garlic Epic Stuffed Crust: Same as Epic Stuffed but with garlic butter herb flavor baked into the crust wall. The most indulgent option. Pairs extremely well with Pepperoni because the garlic complements the spiced meat.
  • Gluten-Free Crust: Available on Small only. Made from ancient grains (sorghum, teff, amaranth, quinoa). Not recommended for Celiac disease due to shared kitchen preparation.

Papa Johns Pepperoni Pizza vs Domino's vs Pizza Hut: Full Comparison

Feature Papa Johns Domino's Pizza Hut
Cheese type100% real mozzarellaMozzarella blendMozzarella blend
DoughFresh, never frozenFresh dailyFresh daily
Pepperoni stylePremium spicy slicedStandard slicedStandard sliced
Box extrasGarlic sauce + PepperonciniNoneNone
Starting price (large)$17.99~$15.99~$15.99
Crust options654
App dealsYesYesYes
Loyalty programPapa RewardsDomino's RewardsHut Rewards

The key differentiator: Papa Johns charges a slight premium over Domino's and Pizza Hut for a large Pepperoni Pizza, but the quality gap — specifically the fresh dough, real mozzarella, and premium pepperoni — justifies it for most customers. In blind taste tests frequently cited by food media, Papa Johns Pepperoni Pizza consistently scores higher on crust flavor and cheese quality than its two main competitors.

Where Domino's wins: speed and value deals. Their "Best Deal Ever" promotion at $9.99 for a medium is hard to beat on price alone.

Where Pizza Hut wins: stuffed crust availability in all sizes and the nostalgic pan pizza heritage.

Honest Review: Is Papa Johns Pepperoni Pizza Worth It in 2026?

After reviewing customer feedback across multiple platforms and food review sites in 2026, here is the honest picture:

What customers consistently love:
The garlic sauce inclusion is considered non-negotiable by long-time customers — it elevates a standard pizza experience into something distinctly Papa Johns. The pepperoni quality is genuinely better than what Domino's or Pizza Hut delivers at a comparable price point. The crust has a consistent chew that comes from never-frozen dough, which food reviewers note as clearly distinguishable from competitors.

What customers commonly complain about:
Location inconsistency is the most repeated complaint. Some Papa Johns stores over-sauce the pizza, which makes the crust soggy by the time it reaches the customer. Others under-crisp the pepperoni. The quality experience depends significantly on the individual store and the time of day you order.
Delivery fees ($3.99–$5.99) plus the platform fee if ordering through DoorDash or Grubhub make the total cost noticeably higher than the base pizza price. Ordering direct through the Papa Johns app or website eliminates the platform markup.

The verdict: Papa Johns Pepperoni Pizza in 2026 remains one of the best mass-market pepperoni pizzas in the country. It is not the cheapest option, but the ingredients are genuinely better than what you get from the alternatives. The sweet spot for value is the Large Original Crust at $17.99 with a promo code applied — which often brings it down to $12–$14.

How to Order Papa Johns Pepperoni Pizza

  • Online: Visit papajohns.com → Select Pizzas → Pepperoni Pizza → Choose size, crust, and extras → Apply promo code at checkout.
  • App (iOS & Android): The Papa Johns app offers exclusive deals not available on the website. It also includes Papa Track, which shows your order status from dough prep through delivery. Recommended for regular customers.
  • By Phone: Call your local Papa Johns and place your order directly. Useful if you have customization requests or live in an area with poor app coverage. Find your store's number using our Store Locator.
  • Carryout vs Delivery: Carryout saves you the delivery fee and often qualifies for additional carryout discounts. If you are within 10 minutes of a Papa Johns, carryout is the better value option.
  • Best time to order: Tuesday through Thursday evenings typically have the shortest wait times. Friday and Saturday dinner hours (6–9 PM) are the busiest, which can affect pizza quality due to high oven volume.

  • New York Style: Large, foldable slices with a soft, pliable crust. Available in Large and XL. If you grew up eating NY pizza, this is the closest approximation from a delivery chain.
  • Epic Stuffed Crust: Mozzarella cheese baked into the crust edge. Adds approximately 80–100 calories per slice but delivers a satisfying cheese-pull experience at the crust. Worth it if you are sharing with cheese lovers.

How to Order Papa Johns Pepperoni Pizza

  • Online: Visit papajohns.com → Select Pizzas → Pepperoni Pizza → Choose size, crust, and extras → Apply promo code at checkout.
  • App (iOS & Android): The Papa Johns app offers exclusive deals not available on the website. It also includes Papa Track, which shows your order status from dough prep through delivery. Recommended for regular customers.
  • By Phone: Call your local Papa Johns and place your order directly. Useful if you have customization requests or live in an area with poor app coverage. Find your store's number using our Store Locator.
  • Carryout vs Delivery: Carryout saves you the delivery fee and often qualifies for additional carryout discounts. If you are within 10 minutes of a Papa Johns, carryout is the better value option.
  • Best time to order: Tuesday through Thursday evenings typically have the shortest wait times. Friday and Saturday dinner hours (6–9 PM) are the busiest, which can affect pizza quality due to high oven volume.


Calorie-saving tips:

  • Thin Crust reduces calories by roughly 60–80 calories per slice.
  • Ordering a medium instead of a large cuts per-slice sodium by over 200mg.
  • Removing extra cheese and keeping a single layer of pepperoni is the lowest-calorie version.

faqs.question: What is the 2026 price for a Large Pepperoni Pizza?
faqs.answer: In 2026, the standard price for a Large 14" Pepperoni Original Crust pizza is **$17.99**. For those craving extra cheese in the crust, the Epic Stuffed Crust version is available for **$20.99**.

faqs.question: How many calories are in one slice of Pepperoni pizza?
faqs.answer: A single slice of a Large hand-tossed original crust Pepperoni pizza contains approximately **230 to 320 calories**. Opting for the Thin Crust can reduce this to about **210 calories** per slice.

faqs.question: Can I customize the crust type for Pepperoni Pizza?
faqs.answer: Yes! Papa John's offers **Original Hand-Tossed, Crispy Thin, Epic Stuffed Crust, and Gluten-Free** options. Note that the Gluten-Free crust is currently only available for Small 10-inch pizzas.

faqs.question: Does Papa John's use real mozzarella?
faqs.answer: Absolutely. We use **100% real mozzarella cheese** made from high-quality milk. We never use starch-based fillers or analog cheeses found in lower-tier pizza chains.

faqs.question: What dipping sauce comes with the Pepperoni Pizza?
faqs.answer: Every standard pizza order includes one cup of our legendary **Special Garlic Dipping Sauce** and one signature Peperoncini pepper in the box.

faqs.question: How many slices are in each size?
faqs.answer: Small (6 slices), Medium (8 slices), Large (8 slices), and Extra Large (10 slices). We also offer **Square Cut** for larger parties.

faqs.question: Is the pepperoni halal or pork-based?
faqs.answer: In the United States, Papa John's pepperoni is made from a blend of **pork and beef**. It is not considered Halal. For Halal options, please check specific international locations.

faqs.question: Are there any current Pepperoni Pizza deals?
faqs.answer: Yes, we often have 'Any Large Specialty' deals. Visit our Coupons Page for the best updated 2026 discounts.

faqs.question: Can I add double pepperoni?
faqs.answer: Yes. Double pepperoni is available for an additional $2.25. It significantly increases the coverage and crispiness, and is popular among customers who want a more indulgent, meat-forward pizza.

faqs.question: Is Papa Johns Pepperoni Pizza gluten-free?
faqs.answer: Not by default. The Original, Thin, NY Style, and Stuffed crusts all contain wheat. A Gluten-Free crust option exists for Small pizzas only, but it is prepared in a shared kitchen and is not safe for Celiac disease.

faqs.question: How long does Papa Johns delivery take?
faqs.answer: Average delivery time is 30–45 minutes depending on your location and the time of day. Use Papa Track in the app for real-time updates.

title: Papa Johns BBQ Chicken Bacon Pizza 2026: Toppings, Price, Calories & Honest Review
description: Papa Johns BBQ Chicken Bacon Pizza — full 2026 price guide ($14.49–$23.99), calories per slice, toppings breakdown, vs Domino's & Pizza Hut + ranch sauce pairing tip.
fullContent:
BBQ pizza is the most divisive item on any pizza menu. Half the room loves the sweet-smoky sauce swap. The other half refuses to accept anything except tomato. Papa Johns BBQ Chicken Bacon Pizza sits squarely in the middle of that debate — and does it better than almost any competitor in the US market. In 2026, it remains one of the top five most-ordered specialty pizzas at Papa Johns, driven by a combination of genuinely quality ingredients: all-white-meat grilled chicken, hickory-smoked bacon, fresh-cut red onions, and a proprietary BBQ sauce base that manages to be tangy and rich without becoming syrupy.

In a three-chain taste test published by a food review site comparing Papa Johns, Domino's, and Pizza Hut BBQ chicken specialty pizzas, Papa Johns' BBQ Chicken pizza was called a "standout, blending sweet and savory tastes perfectly."

This guide gives you the complete 2026 picture: every price by size, the full calorie and nutrition breakdown per slice, a detailed ingredient breakdown, crust recommendations for this specific pizza, the key differences from the Hawaiian BBQ Chicken variant, and an honest review of where this pizza earns its price.



What Is Papa Johns BBQ Chicken Bacon Pizza?

Papa Johns BBQ Chicken Bacon Pizza is a specialty pizza that uses BBQ sauce as its base instead of the chain's standard vine-ripened tomato sauce. Over that sauce goes grilled white-meat chicken, hickory-smoked bacon strips, fresh-cut red onions, and 100% real mozzarella cheese — all on the signature hand-tossed never-frozen original dough.

The flavor profile is deliberately sweet and smoky: the BBQ sauce provides tangy sweetness, the bacon brings smokiness and salt, the grilled chicken adds a clean protein base, and the red onions contribute a mild pungency that brightens the entire combination. Together these create a pizza that is noticeably different in character from a standard tomato-based specialty pizza — which is exactly the point.

What distinguishes the Papa Johns version from Domino's BBQ Chicken specialty and Pizza Hut's equivalent is the quality of the chicken. Papa Johns uses all-white-meat grilled chicken — not breaded, not pre-cooked popcorn chicken pieces — and the chicken is seasoned before grilling. This results in chunks that hold their moisture through oven baking without becoming rubbery, a challenge that cheaper chicken toppings consistently fail.

As with all Papa Johns pizzas, every box includes one Special Garlic Dipping Sauce and one Pepperoncini pepper. For this pizza specifically, ranch dipping sauce is the preferred upgrade — the cool creaminess of ranch against the smoky BBQ pizza is one of the best flavor combinations on the menu.



Complete Toppings List — Every Ingredient Explained

  • BBQ Sauce (base): Papa Johns' proprietary BBQ sauce is made from tomato paste, molasses, sugar, vinegar, and spices. It is tangy and moderately sweet — not as sweet as some fast-food BBQ sauces, but noticeably sweeter than the standard pizza sauce. The molasses base gives it a slight smokiness even before the bacon is added.
  • Grilled White-Meat Chicken: All-white-meat grilled chicken, seasoned and cooked before application. No breading, no fillers. Arrives on the pizza as identifiable chunks rather than pre-shredded or diced pieces. This is the single most important quality differentiator between Papa Johns BBQ Chicken Bacon Pizza and lower-tier versions of this pizza.
  • Hickory-Smoked Bacon: Bacon strips (not crumbles or bits) with a hickory smoke profile that complements the BBQ sauce base. Contributes both fat and salt, which balances the sweetness of the sauce. The strips crisp partially in the oven, adding a textural element that crumbled bacon cannot provide.
  • Fresh-cut Red Onions: Thinly sliced red onions added fresh before baking. Red onions are more assertive than white onions and hold up better through the oven bake without becoming completely soft. They add a mild sharpness that cuts through the richness of the bacon and BBQ sauce.
  • 100% Real Mozzarella Cheese: The same mozzarella used across all Papa Johns pizzas. On a BBQ base, the mild, slightly milky flavor of real mozzarella works better than a sharper cheese would — it acts as a neutral layer between the sweet sauce and the smoky meats.


Papa Johns BBQ Chicken Bacon Pizza Price — All Sizes (2026)

Prices reflect the national standard. Local variation of $0.50–$2.00 is common. Delivery fees are not included.

Size Diameter Slices Original Crust Price
Small10 inches6 slices$14.49
Medium12 inches8 slices$17.49
Large14 inches8 slices$20.99
Extra Large16 inches10 slices$23.99

Crust upgrade pricing:

Gluten-Free Crust (Small only)+$2.00

Popular customizations and their prices:

Add-onPrice

Ranch Dipping Sauce$0.85
Extra BBQ Sauce$0.85

💡 Best ways to save on BBQ Chicken Bacon Pizza:

  • Apply verified promo codes from our Papa Johns Coupons page — codes updated daily
  • Join Papa Rewards to earn Papa Dough toward free future orders
  • Order carryout to eliminate the $3.99–$5.99 delivery fee — especially worth it on a $20.99 pizza
  • The Papa Johns app often has specialty pizza bundle deals not available on the website


Papa Johns BBQ Chicken Bacon Pizza Calories — Full Nutrition Per Slice

BBQ Chicken Bacon Pizza is nutritionally different from tomato-based specialty pizzas primarily because of the BBQ sauce. The sauce contains added sugar (from molasses) which adds approximately 3–5 grams of sugar per slice compared to the standard tomato sauce. It is also slightly lower in sodium than meat-heavy pizzas because the chicken is leaner than sausage and Canadian bacon.

📌 Nutrition notes specific to BBQ Chicken Bacon Pizza:

  • The sugar content (6–8g per slice) is significantly higher than a tomato-sauce pizza because of the molasses-based BBQ sauce — important for customers monitoring sugar intake
  • The grilled chicken makes this pizza a genuinely good protein source — 14–16g protein per large slice with lean white meat rather than processed sausage
  • Compared to other loaded specialties, BBQ Chicken Bacon has similar calories but noticeably less sodium because it uses only two meats (chicken and bacon)


Allergen & Ingredient Information

Contains: Wheat (gluten), milk, soy, chicken, pork (bacon). The BBQ sauce contains vinegar, molasses, and spices.

  • No pork except bacon: Unlike The Works and The Meats, the BBQ Chicken Bacon Pizza contains only one pork product — bacon. The chicken is poultry only.
  • Is it halal? No — the bacon is pork-based and is not halal-certified in US locations.
  • Is it vegetarian? No. Contains both chicken and bacon.
  • Gluten-free option: Available on Small only with the Ancient Grains crust. Not safe for Celiac disease due to shared kitchen preparation.
  • Is the BBQ sauce spicy? No. Papa Johns' BBQ sauce is mild and tangy with no heat. Customers who want spice can request banana peppers or jalapeños as additions.


Which Crust Is Best for BBQ Chicken Bacon Pizza?

Crust choice changes the BBQ Chicken Bacon Pizza experience meaningfully because the BBQ sauce is sweeter and wetter than tomato sauce, which affects how different crusts hold up.

  • Original Crust — best choice for delivery. The hand-tossed dough is substantial enough to absorb moisture from the BBQ sauce without becoming soggy. This is the crust the pizza was designed for.
  • Crispy Thin Crust — order carryout only. Delicious when fresh but struggles with BBQ sauce moisture during delivery. Order carryout and eat within five minutes of pickup.
  • New York Style — excellent for groups. Larger slices with a pliable crust, holds up better under the sauce load than Thin Crust.
  • Epic Stuffed Crust — the premium choice. Mozzarella baked into the crust edge pairs surprisingly well with the BBQ flavor. At ~400 calories per large slice, it is the most indulgent version.
  • Garlic Epic Stuffed Crust — use caution. The garlic butter can clash slightly with the sweetness of the BBQ sauce. Standard Epic Stuffed Crust is the better choice for this pizza.


BBQ Chicken Bacon Pizza vs Hawaiian BBQ Chicken: What Is the Difference?

FeatureBBQ Chicken BaconHawaiian BBQ Chicken
Sauce baseBBQ sauceBBQ sauce
ChickenGrilled white-meat chickenGrilled white-meat chicken
BaconYes — hickory-smokedYes — hickory-smoked
PineappleNoYes — pineapple tidbits
OnionsFresh red onionsFresh-cut onions
MozzarellaYesYes
Sweetness levelModerate (sauce only)High (sauce + pineapple)
Calories/slice (large)~310–350~320–360


Papa Johns BBQ Chicken Bacon vs Domino's BBQ Chicken vs Pizza Hut BBQ Chicken: Full Comparison

FeaturePapa JohnsDomino'sPizza Hut
Chicken typeGrilled white-meat (chunks)Grilled chicken (smaller pieces)Grilled chicken
BaconHickory-smoked stripsBacon crumblesBacon crumbles
SauceProprietary BBQ (molasses-based)Sweet BBQHoney BBQ
OnionsFresh red onionsFresh onionsWhite onions
Cheese100% real mozzarellaMozzarella blendMozzarella blend
Box extrasGarlic sauce + PepperonciniNoneNone
Starting price (large)$20.99~$17.99~$18.99
Calories/slice (large)~310–350~300–330~280–320

Why Papa Johns wins on chicken quality: The use of all-white-meat grilled chicken in identifiable chunks is the defining quality advantage. Multiple food reviewers noted that Papa Johns' chicken topping holds up in the oven better than competitors' versions, maintaining moisture and texture rather than drying out.

Where Domino's has an edge: Price. Domino's BBQ chicken pizza options tend to start $2–$3 cheaper before promo codes. On ingredient quality, Papa Johns is the clear choice.

Pizza Hut's position: Pizza Hut's Honey BBQ sauce is noticeably sweeter than Papa Johns' molasses-based version. Most food reviewers find it one-dimensional compared to the complexity of Papa Johns' BBQ sauce.



Honest Review: Is Papa Johns BBQ Chicken Bacon Pizza Worth Ordering in 2026?

What customers consistently praise:

The all-white-meat grilled chicken is the most frequently cited strength. The BBQ sauce quality is genuine: molasses-based with real tang rather than the corn-syrup sweetness of generic fast-food BBQ. The hickory-smoked bacon strips add both flavor and texture that bacon crumbles cannot match.

The fresh red onions are the sleeper ingredient — customers who initially request "no onions" often discover after trying it that the red onions are what gives the pizza its brightness. The mild sharpness cuts through the richness of the bacon-sauce-cheese combination in a way that no other topping on the pizza does.

Where it falls short:

The BBQ sauce sweetness can be polarizing, particularly on reheated slices where the sugar in the sauce intensifies. If you are reheating leftovers, use an oven or air fryer rather than a microwave — microwaving concentrates the sauce sweetness and makes the pizza feel cloying.

Portion of chicken and bacon can vary by location. Topping distribution is sometimes uneven depending on the individual store and the prep time. Requesting carryout at a non-peak hour gives you the highest chance of a consistently topped pizza.

The verdict: At $20.99 for a Large, BBQ Chicken Bacon Pizza is worth every dollar for customers who specifically want BBQ flavor in their pizza. With a promo code from our coupons page, it regularly comes down to $14–$16, which is excellent value for this ingredient quality.



How to Order Papa Johns BBQ Chicken Bacon Pizza

  • Online: Go to papajohns.com → Specialty Pizzas → BBQ Chicken Bacon → Choose size, crust, and any customizations → Add ranch dipping sauce → Apply promo code at checkout.
  • Papa Johns App: Recommended for regular customers. App-exclusive deals frequently apply to specialty pizzas. Use Papa Track for real-time delivery updates.
  • By Phone: Find your local Papa Johns number at our Store Locator. Specify BBQ Chicken Bacon, your preferred crust and size, and request any modifications.

💡 Pro ordering tips:

  • Request extra red onions — they make the pizza significantly brighter in flavor
  • Add ranch dipping sauce ($0.85) instead of using the included garlic sauce — ranch complements BBQ pizza better
  • Request well-done if you prefer slightly crispier bacon and a firmer crust edge — especially recommended for delivery orders
  • Order carryout during off-peak hours (2–5 PM) for the most consistently topped version of this pizza

faqs.question: What is on Papa Johns BBQ Chicken Bacon Pizza?
faqs.answer: It contains grilled white-meat chicken, hickory-smoked bacon strips, fresh-cut red onions, and 100% real mozzarella cheese, all on a BBQ sauce base instead of the standard tomato sauce.

faqs.question: How much does a large Papa Johns BBQ Chicken Bacon Pizza cost in 2026?
faqs.answer: A Large (14-inch) BBQ Chicken Bacon Pizza with Original Crust is $20.99. The Epic Stuffed Crust version is $23.99. Prices vary slightly by location.

faqs.question: How many calories in Papa Johns BBQ Chicken Bacon Pizza?
faqs.answer: A slice of a Large BBQ Chicken Bacon Pizza (Original Crust) contains approximately 310–350 calories. A Small slice has about 230 calories. The Thin Crust Large reduces this to approximately 270 calories per slice.

faqs.question: Is Papa Johns BBQ Chicken Bacon Pizza spicy?
faqs.answer: No. The BBQ sauce is mild and tangy — no heat. For spice, add banana peppers or jalapeños when ordering, or ask for buffalo sauce as an additional drizzle.

faqs.question: What is the difference between Papa Johns BBQ Chicken Bacon and Hawaiian BBQ Chicken Pizza?
faqs.answer: Both use BBQ sauce, grilled chicken, bacon, and red onions. The Hawaiian version also adds pineapple tidbits, increasing sweetness. BBQ Chicken Bacon has no pineapple and is less sweet overall.

faqs.question: Is Papa Johns BBQ Chicken Bacon Pizza available year-round?
faqs.answer: Yes. It is a permanent menu item, not a seasonal or limited-time offering.

faqs.question: What dipping sauce goes best with BBQ Chicken Bacon Pizza?
faqs.answer: Ranch is the preferred pairing — the cool, creamy flavor of ranch balances the sweetness of the BBQ sauce and complements the smoky bacon. The included Special Garlic Sauce also works but is a less natural pairing than with tomato-based pizzas.

faqs.question: Can I get BBQ Chicken Bacon Pizza without bacon?
faqs.answer: Yes. Any topping can be removed when ordering online or through the app at no cost. Removing bacon makes it a BBQ Chicken pizza with red onions — a lighter, lower-sodium option.

title: Papa John's Philly Cheesesteak Papadia Price & Review 2026
description: Comprehensive guide to the Philly Cheesesteak Papadia. 2026 prices, calories, sauce pairings, and why it is better than a calzone.
fullContent:
The **Philly Cheesesteak Papadia** is a culinary masterpiece inspired by the classic flavors of Philadelphia, reimagined into a portable flatbread sandwich. Since its launch, it has become a staple for lunch-goers and solo diners across the United States. In 2026, it remains one of the highest-value items on the Papa John's Menu. To save even more on your lunch break, view our Daily Deals.

What makes the Philly Papadia stand out is the quality of the fillings. We use tender, sliced steak strips combined with fresh-cut onions and green peppers. Instead of standard pizza sauce, this sandwich features a rich, creamy garlic sauce base and melted mozzarella cheese. It is all folded into a toasted flatbread made from our original signature dough. It is a handheld version of a 'Super Loaded' experience, making it perfect for on-the-go meals in busy cities like New York or Seattle.

According to Cheesesteak history, the combination of steak and onions is a timeless American tradition, and Papa John's honors this with every Papadia made. One Philly Cheesesteak Papadia contains roughly 810 calories and is served with our iconic Special Garlic dipping sauce. Ensure you are getting the best price in 2026 by using the Store Locator to find regional pricing at your nearest Papa John's.

allergens.name: Milk
allergens.note: Contains cheese and garlic sauce dairy.

allergens.name: Wheat
allergens.note: Flatbread shell is wheat-based.

allergens.name: Soy
allergens.note: Soybean oil found in liquid garlic sauce.

allergens.name: Beef
allergens.note: Contains real steak strips.

allergens.name: Shellfish
allergens.note: No seafood products included.

faqs.question: What sauce is in the Philly Cheesesteak Papadia?
faqs.answer: Unlike regular pizzas, this uses a **Creamy Garlic Sauce** base instead of tomato sauce, which complements the steak and onions perfectly.

faqs.question: Is a Papadia just a Calzone?
faqs.answer: No. While similar, a **Papadia** is a folded flatbread made from our original dough, whereas a Calzone is typically stuffed and crimped around the edges. Papadias are lighter and easier to eat with one hand.

faqs.question: How much protein is in a Philly Papadia?
faqs.answer: A Philly Cheesesteak Papadia is high in protein, providing approximately **35 to 40 grams of protein** per sandwich depending on the steak density.

faqs.question: Is the Philly Papadia worth it for lunch?
faqs.answer: At **$7.99**, it is considered one of the best lunch deals in the USA fast-food market for 2026, offering more satiety than a standard sandwich.

faqs.question: How many calories are in the Philly Papadia?
faqs.answer: One Philly Cheesesteak Papadia contains approximately **810 calories**. If you add the dipping sauce, the total is around **960 calories**.

faqs.question: Is the steak in the Papadia real beef?
faqs.answer: Yes, Papa John's uses **premium sliced steak strips**—no fillers—marinated and seasoned in traditional Philly style.

faqs.question: Can I get a Papadia with Thin Crust?
faqs.answer: No, Papadias are exclusively made with our **original hand-tossed dough** flattened into a signature shell to maintain the authentic 'part-pizza, part-sandwich' texture.

faqs.question: What is the 'Parmesan Crusted' version?
faqs.answer: For an additional **$1.00**, we bake a layer of parmesan and herb seasoning into the outer shell for extra crunch and savory flavor.

title: Papa Johns Cheese Pizza 2026: Price, Calories, Crust Options & Honest Review
description: In 2026, with fresh dough baked daily, 100% real mozzarella, and vine-ripened tomato sauce, Papa Johns Cheese Pizza remains one of the cleanest, most honest cheese pizzas in the fast-food market. Explore the full price guide, calories, and crust options.
fullContent:
There is a reason every serious pizza chain measures itself against its plain cheese pizza first. Strip away the toppings, the sauces, the stuffed crusts , and what you are left with is the truest test of a pizza chain's actual quality: dough, sauce, and cheese. At Papa Johns, the Cheese Pizza is exactly that test. And in 2026, with fresh dough baked daily, 100% real mozzarella, and vine-ripened tomato sauce, it remains one of the cleanest, most honest cheese pizzas in the fast-food market.

Whether you are ordering for a picky eater, building a base to customize your own toppings, feeding a vegetarian, or simply craving the pure combination of cheese and sauce on great dough , this guide covers everything you need to know about Papa Johns Cheese Pizza in 2026. Every size, every price, the complete calorie breakdown, how it compares to Domino's and Pizza Hut, and a genuine review of where it excels and where it falls short.



What Is Papa Johns Cheese Pizza?

Papa Johns Cheese Pizza is the chain's foundational menu item , a pizza made with only three core components: original hand-tossed dough, vine-ripened tomato sauce, and 100% real mozzarella cheese. No fillers, no artificial cheese blends, no frozen dough. The same six-ingredient fresh dough that goes into every specialty pizza is the base here, which means the cheese pizza is a direct showcase of what makes Papa Johns fundamentally different from its competitors.

What sets it apart from a standard fast-food cheese pizza is the quality of each layer. The sauce is made from tomatoes that go from vine to can on the same day they are picked, preserving a natural sweetness and acidity that most pizza chain sauces lack. The mozzarella is real , not the starch-extended analog cheese used by lower-tier chains , which means it melts properly, stretches on the pull, and develops natural browning in the oven without turning rubbery.

The cheese pizza is also the most customizable item on the menu. Because it starts with nothing but the essentials, it is the perfect foundation for customers who want to build their own combination using any topping from the Papa Johns menu , from classic pepperoni and sausage to fresh spinach and sun-dried tomatoes. It is also the go-to choice for vegetarians, who get a genuinely ingredient-forward pizza rather than a compromise option.

Every order also includes Papa Johns' famous box extras that competitors do not match: one Special Garlic Dipping Sauce and one whole Pepperoncini pepper. For a plain cheese pizza, the garlic sauce is the ideal accompaniment , it adds the savory, buttery depth that the cheese and sauce invite but do not require.



Papa Johns Cheese Pizza Calories , Complete Nutrition Per Slice

All values are for Original Crust unless noted. Thin Crust reduces calories by approximately 15 20% per slice. Epic Stuffed Crust increases calories by roughly 20 25% per slice due to the cheese filled crust edge.

Size Calories Total Fat Sodium Carbs Protein
Small (10")180 kcal6g360mg25g8g
Medium (12")210 kcal7g410mg28g9g
Large (14")270 290 kcal10g540mg35g12g
Extra Large (16")280 300 kcal11g570mg37g13g
Epic Stuffed Crust (Large)360 kcal14g690mg40g15g


Calorie saving strategies:

  • Thin Crust on a large saves roughly 50 70 calories per slice compared to Original Crust.
  • A Small Cheese Pizza slice (180 cal) is one of the lowest calorie pizza options at any major chain.
  • Skipping extra cheese keeps sodium under 400mg per slice on small and medium sizes.


Which Crust Is Best for Papa Johns Cheese Pizza?

  • Original Crust: Best overall choice. Hand tossed with a soft, slightly chewy interior and golden exterior. Thick enough for cheese and sauce, thin enough so you taste the ingredients, not bread.
  • Crispy Thin Crust: Best for calorie conscious orders. Cracker like texture, rigid, very little bread flavor. Sauce and cheese are the clear stars.
  • New York Style: Best for sharing. Large, foldable slices with a soft, pliable crust. Available in Large and Extra Large. Ideal for a classic pizza night.
  • Epic Stuffed Crust: Best for pure indulgence. Mozzarella baked into the crust adds double the cheese experience to every slice.
  • Gluten Free Crust: Made from ancient grains (sorghum, quinoa). Small only. Great for mild gluten sensitivity (not Celiac safe).


Papa Johns Cheese Pizza vs Domino's vs Pizza Hut: Full Comparison

Feature Papa Johns Domino's Pizza Hut
Cheese type100% real mozzarellaMozzarella cheese blendMozzarella blend
DoughFresh daily, never frozenFresh dailyFresh daily
Sauce styleVine ripened tomato, tangRobust tomato, sweetClassic tomato, mild
Box extrasGarlic sauce + PepperonciniNoneNone
Starting price (large)$15.99~$13.99~$13.99
Vegetarian friendlyYes , fullyYesYes
Calories per slice (large)~270 290~250 270~270 300

On cheese quality: Multiple independent taste tests consistently found Papa Johns ahead on cheese quality specifically. The secret is 100% real mozzarella , Domino's and Pizza Hut use mozzarella blends with processed cheeses that melt and stretch differently.

On sauce: Papa Johns uses a noticeably tangier, brighter tomato sauce than Domino's (sweeter) or Pizza Hut (milder). This sharp freshness stands out best on a Cheese Pizza.



How to Customize Papa Johns Cheese Pizza

  • Classic upgrade: Add pepperoni , the most ordered single topping addition.
  • Meat lover's build: Add Italian sausage, bacon, and Canadian bacon.
  • Vegetarian build: Add mushrooms, green peppers, black olives, banana peppers, and fresh Roma tomatoes.
  • Garlic parmesan twist: Switch to Garlic Parmesan sauce, add extra mozzarella, and finish with roasted garlic.
  • Extra cheese build: Double the mozzarella for $2.50 , best on the Original or NY Style crust to support the weight.


Honest Review: Is Papa Johns Cheese Pizza Worth Ordering in 2026?

The Papa Johns Cheese Pizza earns its place as a top tier chain cheese pizza in 2026 for one simple reason: the ingredients are genuinely better than what most competitors use at the same price point. The real mozzarella makes a visible difference in the melt and stretch. The fresh dough has a flavor that frozen or par baked dough cannot replicate. The vine ripened sauce has natural acidity that processed tomato concentrates lack.

Where it falls short is consistency across locations. The same complaint that follows Papa Johns across its entire menu , that execution quality varies significantly between stores , applies here. A well made Papa Johns Cheese Pizza with properly browned mozzarella and a fully baked, golden crust is excellent fast food pizza. One that is under baked, with pale cheese and a doughy middle, is disappointing.

Verdict: Worth ordering, especially with a promo code. The Large Original Crust at $15.99 is the best size for value. With a verified discount from our coupons page, it regularly drops to $11 13, which is exceptional value for this ingredient quality.



How to Order Papa Johns Cheese Pizza

  • Online (recommended): Visit papajohns.com → Select Pizzas → Cheese Pizza → Apply promo code at checkout.
  • App (iOS & Android): Best option for regular customers. Includes Papa Track real time order tracking and app exclusive deals.
  • By Phone: Call your local Papa Johns directly if you have specific requests (like "well done").
  • Ordering tip: Request your Cheese Pizza well done if you prefer a crispier, more browned crust and cheese. This free modification significantly improves texture.


Related Pages on This Site

  • Papa Johns Pepperoni Pizza , Price, Calories & Review
  • Papa Johns Classic Pizzas , Every Flavor Ranked & Reviewed
  • Papa Johns Pan Pizza Guide
  • Papa Johns Coupons & Deals , Updated Daily
ingredients: Fresh, never-frozen original dough (Enriched wheat flour, water, sugar, soybean oil, salt, yeast)
Vine-ripened tomato pizza sauce (No added sugar or preservatives)
Signature Garlic Dipping Sauce & Pepperoncini included

allergens.note: Contains 100% real mozzarella cheese (Dairy).

allergens.note: Original dough is wheat-based.

allergens.note: Soybean oil used in dough and seasonings.

allergens.name: Eggs
allergens.note: No egg in cheese or standard dough.

allergens.name: Meat
allergens.note: Fully vegetarian.

faqs.question: How much is a large Papa Johns Cheese Pizza in 2026?
faqs.answer: A Large (14-inch) Cheese Pizza with Original Crust starts at $15.99. The Epic Stuffed Crust version is $18.99. Prices vary slightly by location.

faqs.question: How many calories are in a slice of Papa Johns Cheese Pizza?
faqs.answer: A single slice of a Large Cheese Pizza (Original Crust) contains approximately 270–290 calories. A Small slice is around 180 calories, making it one of the lower-calorie cheese pizza options at a major chain. The Thin Crust reduces this further by 50–70 calories per slice.

faqs.question: Is Papa Johns Cheese Pizza vegetarian?
faqs.answer: Yes, the Cheese Pizza contains no meat ingredients. The dough, sauce, and mozzarella cheese are all vegetarian. It is not vegan due to the dairy-based cheese.

faqs.question: Does Papa Johns use real cheese?
faqs.answer: Yes. Papa Johns uses 100% real mozzarella made from pasteurized milk. No analog cheese, no starch-extended blends. This is one of the genuine differentiators between Papa Johns and competitors who use mozzarella blends.

faqs.question: How many slices are in a Papa Johns Cheese Pizza?
faqs.answer: Small: 6 slices. Medium: 8 slices. Large: 8 slices. Extra Large: 10 slices. Square-cut (party cut) is available on request at no extra charge.

faqs.question: Can I add toppings to the Cheese Pizza?
faqs.answer: Yes — any standard Papa Johns topping can be added for $1.75–$2.25 each. The Cheese Pizza serves as the base for fully custom orders. You can add up to 10 toppings.

faqs.question: What is the difference between Papa Johns Cheese Pizza and a build-your-own pizza?
faqs.answer: They are effectively the same thing — a Cheese Pizza is just a build-your-own with no toppings selected. Starting from the Cheese Pizza and adding toppings individually gives you the same result as using the custom pizza builder.

faqs.question: Is Papa Johns Cheese Pizza gluten-free?
faqs.answer: Not by default. A Gluten-Free Crust option is available on Small pizzas only, but it is prepared in a shared kitchen, so it is not safe for Celiac disease. For mild gluten sensitivity, the Gluten-Free Small Cheese Pizza is a reasonable option.

title: Papa Johns Drinks Menu 2026: Every Beverage, Price, Calories & Best Pizza Pairings
description: Complete 2026 guide to Papa Johns drinks. Prices for all sizes ($2.99–$3.49), calorie counts, caffeine breakdown, sugar-free options, and guest-verified pizza pairings.
fullContent:
Every Papa Johns order comes with a question nobody thinks about until the last second: what drink goes with this? The answer matters more than most people realize. The wrong drink alongside a spicy Fiery Buffalo Chicken Pizza makes the heat worse. The right one a cold Mountain Dew, specifically provides the citrus contrast that cuts through capsaicin and resets your palate.

Published: April 2026 | By: Papa Johns Menu Experts

This complete 2026 guide covers every drink on the Papa Johns menu with exact prices for every size, complete calorie counts in one scannable table, the full caffeine breakdown, a dedicated guide for sugar-free and diet options, and the most detailed pizza pairing guide available for any Papa Johns drinks article online.

Complete Papa Johns Drinks Menu 2026 All Beverages

Papa Johns is an official PepsiCo partner, which means every location across the United States exclusively serves Pepsi-branded beverages. No Coca-Cola products are available at any Papa Johns location. The full 2026 drinks lineup includes ten beverage options across regular sodas, zero-sugar variants, bottled water, and select specialty sodas.

Full Price Table Every Drink, Every Size (April 2026)

Drink20 oz Bottle2-Liter Bottle
Pepsi$2.99$3.49
Diet Pepsi$2.99$3.49
Pepsi Zero Sugar$2.99$3.49
Mountain Dew$2.99$3.49
Mountain Dew Zero Sugar$2.99$3.49
Starry (Lemon-Lime)$2.99$3.49
Starry Zero$2.99N/A
Aquafina Water$2.99N/A
Schweppes Ginger Ale$2.99N/A
Crush Orange$2.99N/A

Pricing note: Prices reflect the national 2026 standard. Regional variation of $0.25–$0.50 is possible. Third-party apps (DoorDash, Grubhub, Uber Eats) typically add a $0.50–$1.00 markup per item. Ordering directly through papajohns.com or the Papa Johns app gives you the base price shown above.

How to save on drinks: Under the Papa Pairings deal, a drink can be combined with another qualifying item for $6.99 each. For large family orders, the 2-Liter at $3.49 is always the better value a single 2-Liter provides approximately five to six 12 oz servings, compared to paying $2.99 per 20 oz individually.

Complete Calorie & Nutrition Table All Papa Johns Drinks

This is the one table nobody else has put together in one place. All calorie figures are per 12 oz serving (one-third of a 2-Liter, or two-thirds of a 20 oz bottle) for direct comparison.

DrinkCalories (12 oz)Sugar (g)Caffeine (mg)Sodium (mg)
Pepsi15041g38mg30mg
Diet Pepsi00g36mg35mg
Pepsi Zero Sugar00g69mg35mg
Mountain Dew17046g55mg60mg
Mountain Dew Zero Sugar00g68mg35mg
Starry (Lemon-Lime)15038g0mg35mg
Starry Zero100g0mg35mg
Aquafina Water00g0mg0mg
Schweppes Ginger Ale20052g0mg65mg
Crush Orange19552g0mg45mg

Key nutrition insights:

  • Mountain Dew has the highest calorie count (170 per 12 oz) AND the highest caffeine (55mg) of the standard sodas.
  • Schweppes Ginger Ale is the most calorie-dense option at 200 per 12 oz more than a Pepsi or Mountain Dew.
  • Starry (formerly Sierra Mist) is the only caffeine-free standard soda important for customers ordering late at night or for children.
  • Pepsi Zero Sugar has more caffeine (69mg) than regular Pepsi (38mg) a fact most customers do not know.
  • A full 2-Liter of regular Pepsi contains approximately 800 calories total worth knowing for family orders.

For the complete Papa Johns nutrition data across all menu items, see our Papa Johns Nutrition Guide.

Every Drink Reviewed What You Need to Know Before Ordering

Pepsi The Default Choice

Pepsi is the most ordered drink at Papa Johns by a significant margin, and it earns that position. The caramel cola flavor and carbonation work with almost every pizza on the menu the sweetness cuts through salt, and the fizz resets the palate between bites. The 2-Liter at $3.49 is the best value on the entire drinks menu.

Best paired with: Pepperoni Pizza, The Works, The Meats, BBQ Chicken Bacon any pizza with heavy meat toppings.

Diet Pepsi Full Flavor, Zero Calories

Diet Pepsi uses aspartame as its sweetener and delivers a genuinely close approximation of regular Pepsi flavor. At 0 calories and 36mg caffeine, it is the smart choice for customers who want the cola experience without the sugar impact. The slightly thinner mouthfeel compared to regular Pepsi is the only meaningful difference most people notice.

Best paired with: Garden Fresh Pizza, Cheese Pizza, lighter veggie-focused orders.

Pepsi Zero Sugar The Surprising Caffeine Leader

Pepsi Zero Sugar is technically distinct from Diet Pepsi it uses sucralose and acesulfame potassium (Ace-K) rather than aspartame, which gives it a bolder, slightly less sweet aftertaste. The critical detail most customers miss: at 69mg of caffeine per 12 oz, Pepsi Zero has nearly double the caffeine of regular Pepsi (38mg). If you are ordering late at night and want to sleep, regular Pepsi or Starry Zero is a better choice.

Best paired with: Spicy Garlic Wings, Papadias, Cheesesticks bold, savory menu items.

Mountain Dew The Boldest Standard Soda

Mountain Dew has a devoted following among Papa Johns customers for a specific reason: the citrus punch genuinely does something useful alongside spicy pizza. The high-fructose corn syrup sweetness and concentrated lemon-lime notes provide contrast to capsaicin heat which is why Mountain Dew with a spicy pizza feels like a more considered pairing than it sounds. At 170 calories and 55mg caffeine, it is the most intense regular soda on the menu.

Best paired with: Fiery Buffalo Chicken Pizza, Jalapeño Pepperoni Pizza, any extra-spicy order. The citrus cuts through the heat more effectively than cola.

Mountain Dew Zero Sugar Energy Without the Calories

Mountain Dew Zero Sugar delivers the citrus boldness of regular Mountain Dew with 0 calories and 68mg of caffeine actually slightly more than the regular version. The flavor profile is close but slightly less syrupy, which many customers prefer. If you regularly order Mountain Dew and are watching your calorie intake, this is a near-identical substitution.

Best paired with: Same spicy pairings as regular Mountain Dew Fiery Buffalo Chicken, wings with hot sauce, spicy Papadias.

Starry The Caffeine-Free Lemon-Lime Option

Starry replaced Sierra Mist in the PepsiCo lineup in 2023 and is now the standard lemon-lime option at Papa Johns. It is lighter and crisper than Mountain Dew, with a clean citrus profile and no caffeine making it the best choice for customers who want something refreshing without the intensity. The sugar-free variant (Starry Zero) is an excellent option at just 10 calories.

Best paired with: Alfredo-based pizzas (Spinach Alfredo, Tuscan Six Cheese), garlic-heavy items (Garlic Knots, Garlic Parmesan Breadsticks), desserts. The clean acidity complements cream-based flavors.

Aquafina The Underrated Choice

Aquafina water is genuinely underrated as a pizza pairing. With zero calories, zero sodium, and zero flavor competition, it allows you to taste your food clearly between sips. Customers who care about tasting the herbs and ingredients in specialty pizzas like the Tuscan Six Cheese or Spinach Alfredo will notice their flavors more distinctly when drinking water versus soda.

At $2.99 for a 20 oz bottle, it is the same price as the sodas making it a smart choice for value and the best choice for very young children. It is the only truly neutral drink on the menu.

Schweppes Ginger Ale The Specialist Pick

Schweppes Ginger Ale is the most underordered drink on the Papa Johns menu and also one of the most interesting pairings. At 200 calories and 52g of sugar per 12 oz, it is the highest-calorie option. But the ginger flavor does something unique alongside rich, cheesy pizzas the natural ginger compounds aid digestion and reduce the heaviness of a cheese-heavy meal. It is particularly good alongside extra-cheese or thick-crust orders.

Best paired with: Epic Stuffed Crust pizzas, extra-cheese orders, Double Chocolate Brownie (ginger cuts through the chocolate richness).

Crush Orange The Kids' Favorite

Crush Orange is the most polarizing drink on the menu. Its intensely sweet, artificial orange flavor is either perfect or overwhelming depending on the palate. At 195 calories and 52g sugar, it is in the same tier as Schweppes on both measures. The bright orange flavor pairs surprisingly well with sweet-and-savory pizzas.

Best paired with: Hawaiian BBQ Chicken Pizza, Cinnamon Pull Aparts (as a dessert pairing). Keep it ice cold warm Crush Orange is one of the least pleasant drink experiences at any pizza chain.

Sugar-Free & Diet Drinks Guide Papa Johns 2026

For customers managing diabetes, watching calorie intake, or following low-sugar diets, Papa Johns offers four zero-sugar or near-zero options. Here is the complete guide:

DrinkCaloriesSugarSweetenerCaffeineBest For
Diet Pepsi00gAspartame36mgClassic cola taste, moderate caffeine
Pepsi Zero Sugar00gSucralose + Ace-K69mgBold cola, high energy
Mountain Dew Zero Sugar00gSucralose + Ace-K68mgCitrus, high energy
Starry Zero100gSucralose0mgCaffeine-free, citrus refreshment
Aquafina Water00gNone0mgPurest option, allergen-free

For diabetics: Diet Pepsi and Starry Zero are generally well-tolerated because aspartame and sucralose have minimal effect on blood glucose. Always consult your healthcare provider regarding artificial sweeteners. Aquafina is the safest choice with no sweeteners of any kind.

For children: Starry Zero (0mg caffeine) or Aquafina are the recommended choices for kids under 12. Both Diet Pepsi and Pepsi Zero Sugar contain meaningful caffeine (36–69mg) and should be avoided for young children, particularly with evening pizza orders.

For keto/low-carb diets: All five options above have 0–10 calories and 0g net carbs. The drinks will not break ketosis. The pizza and sides are a different calculation see our Papa Johns Nutrition Guide for carb counts by item.

The Caffeine Guide Which Papa Johns Drinks Have Caffeine

DrinkCaffeine per 12 ozCaffeine Level
Pepsi Zero Sugar69mgHigh
Mountain Dew Zero Sugar68mgHigh
Mountain Dew55mgMedium-High
Diet Pepsi36mgMedium
Pepsi38mgMedium
Starry0mgNone
Starry Zero0mgNone
Aquafina0mgNone
Schweppes Ginger Ale0mgNone
Crush Orange0mgNone

The counterintuitive fact: Zero-sugar Pepsi and Mountain Dew variants contain more caffeine than their regular versions not less. Pepsi Zero Sugar (69mg) has 82% more caffeine than regular Pepsi (38mg). If you are sensitive to caffeine and want a zero-calorie option, Starry Zero or Aquafina are your best choices.

Late-night ordering: If you are ordering Papa Johns at 9 PM or later and plan to sleep within a few hours, choose Starry, Starry Zero, Schweppes Ginger Ale, Crush Orange, or Aquafina all contain zero caffeine.

The Complete Pizza Pairing Guide What to Drink With Every Papa Johns Pizza

The science behind pairing works on two principles: carbonation cuts through fat and salt, and flavor contrast enhances rather than competes. Here is the most detailed pairing guide available for Papa Johns specifically:

Classic Pizzas

  • Pepperoni Pizza→Pepsi. The caramel sweetness of cola perfectly offsets the salty, spiced pepperoni. This is the most naturally harmonious combination on the entire menu.
  • Cheese Pizza→Starry or Aquafina. A plain cheese pizza is subtle enough that a bold soda can overpower it. Lemon-lime or water lets the mozzarella and tomato sauce come through clearly.
  • Sausage Pizza→Mountain Dew. The Italian seasoning in the sausage needs a bold citrus contrast rather than the sweetness of cola.

Super Loaded Specialty Pizzas

  • The Works→Pepsi. Seven toppings require a drink bold enough to keep up. Pepsi's carbonation cuts through the layered meat and vegetable combination without competing.
  • The Meats→Diet Pepsi or Pepsi Zero Sugar. Heavy all-meat pizzas pair best with cola that does not add sweetness on top of the savory meat load. The zero-sugar versions keep the palate clean.
  • BBQ Chicken Bacon→Mountain Dew Zero Sugar. The sweetness of the BBQ sauce base is already present in the pizza. Mountain Dew's citrus (not cola sweetness) provides contrast rather than redundancy.
  • Fiery Buffalo Chicken→Mountain Dew or Starry. Both provide citrus acids that counteract capsaicin. This is the one pairing where the science is most clearly demonstrated the citrus literally reduces perceived heat.
  • Tuscan Six Cheese→Starry or Aquafina. Six cheeses need a neutral or lightly acidic drink. Cola sweetness competes; citrus or water complements.
  • Hawaiian BBQ Chicken→Crush Orange or Starry. Pineapple and citrus are natural partners. Either option works here.

The 2-Liter Value Guide How Many People, How Many Bottles

The 2-Liter at $3.49 is one of the best value items on the Papa Johns menu. Here is the practical math for group ordering:

Group SizePizzas2-Liters RecommendedEstimated Drink Cost
2 people1 pizza1 x 2-Liter$3.49
4 people1–2 pizzas1–2 x 2-Liters$3.49–$6.98
6 people2 pizzas2 x 2-Liters$6.98
8–10 people3 pizzas3 x 2-Liters$10.47
12+ (party)4+ pizzas4 x 2-Liters$13.96

A standard 2-Liter yields approximately 67 oz total about five to six standard glasses or five 12 oz servings. For parties of four, one 2-Liter per two pizzas is the practical minimum. Order a second 2-Liter if anyone in your group is a heavy soda drinker.

Pro tip: Order two different flavors one regular Pepsi 2-Liter and one Mountain Dew 2-Liter for a group of six or more. This covers the two most popular preferences and avoids anyone feeling stuck with a soda they do not want.

How to Order Papa Johns Drinks in 2026

Online: Go to papajohns.com→Add your food to cart→Drinks section appears at checkout→Select size and flavor→Apply promo code. Drinks add to the total without a separate delivery fee.

Papa Johns App (iOS & Android): The most convenient method for regular customers. All drink options are visible in the menu with current pricing. App-only deals occasionally include free or discounted drinks with pizza orders.

By Phone: Call your local Papa Johns find your location using our Store Locator and specify drink size and flavor when placing your order.

Carryout tip: If you are picking up your order, cold drinks are stored in the refrigerator until you arrive. Carryout drinks will always be colder than delivered drinks, which travel in a bag for 20–45 minutes. For maximum cold temperature, choose carryout or add ice at home immediately upon delivery.

Deals to check: Visit our Papa Johns Coupons page for current drink bundle promotions some deals include a 2-Liter free with a Large pizza order. Also join Papa Rewards to earn Papa Dough on every drink purchase.

Frequently Asked Questions

What drinks does Papa Johns have in 2026?
Papa Johns offers ten beverages in 2026: Pepsi, Diet Pepsi, Pepsi Zero Sugar, Mountain Dew, Mountain Dew Zero Sugar, Starry, Starry Zero, Aquafina Bottled Water, Schweppes Ginger Ale, and Crush Orange. All are PepsiCo products Papa Johns does not serve Coca-Cola at any US location.

Does Papa Johns sell Coke or Pepsi?
Papa Johns exclusively sells Pepsi products. Papa Johns is an official PepsiCo partner and does not serve Coca-Cola, Sprite, Fanta, or any Coca-Cola branded beverages at any US location.

How much is a 2-Liter at Papa Johns?
A 2-Liter bottle at Papa Johns costs $3.49 in 2026. Available in Pepsi, Diet Pepsi, Pepsi Zero Sugar, and Mountain Dew. The 2-Liter is available in fewer flavor options than the 20 oz bottles.

How many calories are in Papa Johns drinks?
Calories per 12 oz: Pepsi 150 cal, Mountain Dew 170 cal, Starry 150 cal, Schweppes Ginger Ale 200 cal, Crush Orange 195 cal. Zero-calorie options include Diet Pepsi, Pepsi Zero Sugar, Mountain Dew Zero Sugar, Starry Zero, and Aquafina Water.

Does Papa Johns have caffeine-free drinks?
Yes. Starry, Starry Zero, Schweppes Ginger Ale, Crush Orange, and Aquafina Water all contain zero caffeine. Diet Pepsi (36mg), Pepsi (38mg), Mountain Dew (55mg), Pepsi Zero Sugar (69mg), and Mountain Dew Zero Sugar (68mg) all contain caffeine.

What is the healthiest drink at Papa Johns?
Aquafina Water is the healthiest option zero calories, zero sugar, zero caffeine, zero sodium, zero artificial sweeteners. For carbonated options, Diet Pepsi, Pepsi Zero Sugar, Mountain Dew Zero Sugar, and Starry Zero are all zero-calorie choices.

What sizes do Papa Johns drinks come in?
Papa Johns offers 20 oz bottles and 2-Liter bottles. Most flavors are available in 20 oz. The 2-Liter is available in Pepsi, Diet Pepsi, Pepsi Zero Sugar, and Mountain Dew. Aquafina, Starry Zero, Schweppes Ginger Ale, and Crush Orange are typically 20 oz only.

Are Papa Johns drinks vegan?
Yes. All beverages on the Papa Johns drinks menu are vegan-friendly. None contain animal-derived ingredients. Diet Pepsi and other aspartame-sweetened drinks are also vegan.

What drink goes best with Papa Johns pizza?
For meat-topped pizzas (Pepperoni, The Works), Pepsi is the classic choice. For spicy pizzas (Fiery Buffalo Chicken), Mountain Dew's citrus contrast cuts the heat. See our complete pairing guide above for every pizza on the menu.

Disclaimer: papajohns-menus.us is an independent fan guide not affiliated with Papa John's International. Prices and nutrition are for reference and subject to change by location.

allergens.name: Milk
allergens.note: Soda and water products contain no dairy.

allergens.name: Wheat
allergens.note: Most beverages are gluten-free.

allergens.name: Caffeine
allergens.note: Present in Pepsi and Mountain Dew products.

allergens.name: Sugar
allergens.note: High in regular sodas; 0g in Diet/Zero/Water.

faqs.question: What drinks can you order from Papa John’s menu?
faqs.answer: Papa John’s offers a variety of cold beverages including popular soft drinks, bottled water, and sometimes fruit-based drinks depending on the location. These drinks are designed to pair well with pizzas, sides, and desserts, making your meal more refreshing and complete.

faqs.question: Are drinks included in Papa John’s meal deals?
faqs.answer: Some meal deals and combo offers at Papa John’s may include drinks, especially family bundles or party deals. However, not all promotions come with beverages, so it’s always a good idea to check the deal details before ordering.

faqs.question: Can I customize my drink order at Papa John’s?
faqs.answer: Drink customization is usually limited since most beverages are pre-packaged (cans or bottles). However, you can choose your preferred brand, size, or type such as regular, diet, or zero-sugar options.

faqs.question: What is the price of drinks at Papa John’s?
faqs.answer: The price of drinks at Papa John’s varies depending on the type and size. Generally, local prices range from around $2.00 for small bottles to $3.50 or more for 2-liter bottles. You can see the full drink prices list here.

faqs.question: What are the most popular drinks at Papa John’s?
faqs.answer: Pepsi, Mountain Dew, and Diet Pepsi are some of the most popular choices. Papa John’s also offers Aquafina bottled water and other fruit-based sodas like Starry or Crush, depending on availability.

faqs.question: How many calories are in Papa John’s drinks?
faqs.answer: Calorie counts vary significantly. Regular sodas can range from 150 to 250 calories per serving, while diet sodas, zero-sugar options, and bottled water contain zero calories. Check our nutrition guide for full details.

faqs.question: Does Papa John’s offer bottled water?
faqs.answer: Yes, Papa John’s provides bottled water (typically Aquafina) as a healthier, calorie-free alternative to sugary sodas.

faqs.question: Do Papa John’s drinks contain caffeine?
faqs.answer: Many of the soft drinks like Pepsi and Mountain Dew contain caffeine, while options like Starry, bottled water, and certain fruit-flavored drinks are caffeine-free.

faqs.question: Is there a 2-liter bottle option for Papa John’s drinks?
faqs.answer: Yes, most Papa John’s locations offer 2-liter bottles of popular sodas, making them a great choice for families or large gatherings.

faqs.question: Are Papa John’s drinks available for delivery?
faqs.answer: Yes, you can include any beverage in your delivery order, and they are typically transported in a way that keeps them cool and refreshing until they reach your doorstep.
